title: canarium scholasticum
intro: Canarium scholasticum, also known as the Black Dammar or Malacca Tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the rainforests of Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The extracts of Canarium scholasticum have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting anti-cancer properties. The plant's oil and resin are used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
